title: Detect secrets by entropy and known patterns
description: Combine high-entropy string detection with provider-specific patterns so both random tokens and recognizable key formats are caught.
body: Use when configuring detection or triaging scanner output. Do not rely on a single heuristic alone. Actions: enable entropy-based detection to catch random tokens; add pattern rules for known formats like cloud keys and signed tokens; verify candidates rather than assuming every match is real, but treat plausible matches as live. Validation signals include the scanner flagging both a random base64 token and a recognizable provider key. Risk boundary: dismissing a flagged value as a false positive without verifying can leave a live secret in place, so confirm safely without echoing the value and escalate genuine hits.
